Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze User Input: Input: A draft prompt for a benchmark. Context: DuckDB SQL query on an event_log table. Columns: case_id, activity, timestamp. Task: Filter out cases with more than six events. Return only events from cases with six or fewer events. Key Requirements: Count events per case_id, exclude those with count greater than 6, return full event rows for remaining cases. Goal: The user is sharing a draft prompt. They likely want feedback, improvements, or validation. Assume they want review, refine, provide expected solution.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Key Components of a Good Benchmark Prompt: Clear objective, Schema definition, Input Output expectations, Constraints Edge cases, Evaluation criteria.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Evaluate the Draft Prompt: Strengths: Clear task, specifies table name and columns, explains logic, mentions DuckDB. Weaknesses Areas for Improvement: Doesnt specify data types, no ordering, could be more structured, add example, specify dialect nuances.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Formulate Improvements Refinements: Structure it clearly: Schema, Task, Requirements, Example. Clarify output includes all columns, mention ordering by case_id timestamp, add note about performance idiomatic DuckDB, provide expected solutions.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Draft the Refined Prompt: Requirements: Only include rows where the total number of events for that case_id is 6.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Develop Expected Solution s for Benchmark Grading: Approach 1 Window Function: SELECT EXCLUDE event_count FROM SELECT COUNT OVER PARTITION BY case_id AS event_count FROM event_log WHERE event_count <=6 ORDER BY case_id timestamp. Approach 2 CTE JOIN: WITH case_counts AS SELECT case_id COUNT AS cnt GROUP BY HAVING COUNT <=6 SELECT e FROM event_log e JOIN case_counts.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction Refinement during thought: Check DuckDB syntax: COUNT OVER works. SELECT EXCLUDE valid. Add deterministic ordering. Mention edge cases like NULL case_ids. Note multiple valid approaches.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review of the Response: Matches user intent. Technically accurate. Actionable. Tone professional. Update reference solutions to highlight QUALIFY clause: SELECT FROM event_log QUALIFY COUNT OVER PARTITION BY case_id <=6 ORDER BY case_id timestamp. Optimal DuckDB approach.
